info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/organization/me \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/organization/me", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.description: Get instance organization, only for enterprise edition

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/instance/organization \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/instance/organization", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
